images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese female model embodying a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, captured in a rooftop parking lot under a bright, clear moonlight glow that bathes the scene in an elegant, sophisticated high-key style. She is wearing a form-fitting Japanese school swimsuit, the textured fabric hugging her slim waist and curvy figure with realistic detail, her skin glowing with flawless texture and faint vellus hair. Standing at eye-level, she looks directly into the camera with intense, expressive eyes, her gaze deep and seductive, while the background features a blurred urban nightscape with soft bokeh. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination, overexposed highlights, and sharp focus on her delicate features.8k photo, Large breasts
